title: hortensia japonica
intro: Hortensia japonica, also known as Hydrangea japonica, is a species of flowering plant native to Japan and is part of the Hydrangea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds that have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Hortensia japonica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hortensia japonica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
